description: Assists admin in manually responding to LINE users when bot is paused. Suggests reply drafts based on conversation history and user profile context, which admin can edit before sending via LINE API.

example_response.draft_reply: Suggested reply text for the admin to send to the customer
example_response.tone: The tone of the draft: professional, empathetic, apologetic, informational, casual
example_response.context_notes: Notes about the conversation context and customer situation for the admin
example_response.confidence: Confidence level in the suggested draft: high, medium, low
